name: Cookbiz Co.,Ltd.
summary: Cookbiz Co.,Ltd. provides human resource services specializing in the food industry. The company offers paid employment, recruitment site management, and training services. It also provides job advertisement, talent agency, and scout services. In addition, the company operates Cook Biz Food College, which supports skill improvement. Cookbiz Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
